dark wood gold-trim picture frame edge-crop
member_long_descriptions: Close-up of a dark polished wooden bed with a paneled rectangular headboard, covered by beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows; the crop is edge-cropped showing the mattress top and part of the headboard in a near-camera view, estimated distance ~1.0 m.

Close-up (approx. 0.8 m) of a rectangular beige pillow with horizontal taupe/gray woven stripes; cloth fabric appears slightly wrinkled and compressed, and the pillow is partially cropped at the image edges.

Partial, edge-cropped rectangular beige and cream striped fabric pillow with woven texture and faint taupe/light-brown bands; appears soft and clean, cut off by the crop edges — approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Narrow vertical dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gold inner trim and glass front, showing part of a framed artwork with a tall spire; the crop is edge-cut/partial (top and bottom likely outside view) with slight reflection on the glass; estimated distance from camera ~0.8 m.

Neatly made bed with white and gray striped bedding on a dark wooden frame, headboard and footboard partially visible at left and right; pillow and bedside lamp visible indicating the bed is edge-cropped and partially shown — appears queen-sized and approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Partial/edge-cropped close view of a dark glossy brown wooden nightstand top and carved front drawer visible, showing a small metal/brass knob, scalloped carved edge and polished reflective surface with minor wear; estimated ~0.6 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted-glass light dome; metal mounting and blade arms visible, blades extend to the crop edges and appear stationary — estimated ~2.5 meters from the camera.

Traditional tabletop lamp with a beige, seamed fabric shade emitting warm yellow light; dark bronze decorative metal base is visible at the lower crop and is partially cut off by the image edge, shade shows a darker shadowed area on the upper-left; estimated ~0.8 m from camera.

Frontal view of a dark stained wooden multi-drawer dresser with metal drawer pulls and paneled drawer fronts, slightly worn/matte finish; left side is partially occluded by a bed and the crop is edge-trimmed — appears about 2.0 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a partially cropped pillow showing horizontal beige, gray and off-white stripes on a soft woven fabric surface with slight wrinkles; the pillow is edge-cut in the frame and appears photographed at close range (≈0.4 m).

Full rectangular white-framed window covered by closed white horizontal (venetian) blinds with thin slatted lines and diffuse daylight seeping through; dark curtains are partially visible at the left and right edges and the bottom sill and small gap are visible — approximately 2.0 m from the camera.

Partial edge-crop of a light-gray, white and pale-blue horizontally striped pillowcase or soft pillow surface with a subtle woven/cotton texture and shallow, flat profile; appears cropped at the right edge and is close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m away).

Tall rectangular interior window fully covered by closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl slats) with narrow light gaps between slats and dark curtain panels visible at the sides; bottom-right of the crop shows adjacent wooden furniture — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a partially edge-cropped pillow showing horizontal muted beige, cream and gray woven stripes with visible fabric texture and a seam/fold; appears soft and photographed at roughly 0.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped rectangular beige and cream striped fabric pillow with woven texture and faint taupe/light-brown bands; appears soft and clean, cut off by the crop edges — approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
